About me
Design meets development

I'm Thissa — a BVoc Software Development student at St. Teresa's College, Ernakulam, with hands-on experience producing brand identities, print collateral, and social media visuals. My work sits at the intersection of design and code.

I delivered visuals for a 200-person live event, built a logo-to-feed identity for a 300-follower Instagram brand, produced a full annual newsletter, and co-developed a 7-page responsive website as an academic project.

With dual internships in web design and AI/ML, I bring both a developer's precision and a designer's storytelling instinct to every project.
